reasoning: A 3-month forecast for a single stock with no known exogenous events heavily assumes the efficient market hypothesis and geometric Brownian motion. With typical equity volatility around 30-40% and typical annual drift of 8-10%, the structural likelihood of a positive return over approximately 90 days (from late October 2025 to late January 2026) is roughly 53%. Since only the close date is listed, I am estimating a single point corresponding to the question close date.
